title: Seasonal influenza vaccine uptake in children of school age: winter season 2024 to 2025
body: "Report presenting cumulative data on influenza vaccine uptake in children of school age, vaccinated from 1 September 2024 to 31 January 2025 inclusive, in England.  The tables present seasonal influenza vaccine uptake data in all school-aged children of Reception to Year 11 (aged 4 to 16 years old) by NHS England Region and local authority (LA).  See the pre-release access list.  "
